summary: Frontend testing completed for Tenuta Leone website modernization. All requested features verified working correctly.

issues: Brand logos showing generic placeholders (Luxurious, Boutique, Palm Tree, The Oasis) instead of actual matrimonio.com logo - this is an asset file issue, not code

passed_tests: Spaces slider (SpacesSlider.js) - NO auto-scroll confirmed: slider position unchanged after 5 seconds of waiting
Spaces slider using Swiper with FreeMode and Navigation modules, without Autoplay module
Instagram feed showing 6 images with correct paths (/img/gallery/insta_1.jpg to insta_6.jpg)
Pasticceria page (/pasticceria) showing exactly 3 photos in dolci gallery as requested
Sala detail page (/sala/foyer) lightbox working correctly with yet-another-react-lightbox library
Lightbox opens on image click, shows zoom-in cursor and hint, closes properly
Services section showing Ludoteca service with icon at /img/icon/hotel_1_3.svg
All 7 services displayed: Ampio Parcheggio, Free Charge & WiFi, Ludoteca, Suite Leone, Qualcosa di blu Wedding, Cafè Bar, Piscina Panoramica
Chi Siamo/About section showing brand logos (4 logos displayed)
360° tour iframe embedded and working on sala detail pages
action_items: OPTIONAL: Replace generic brand placeholder images in /frontend/public/img/brand/ with actual matrimonio.com and partner logos if available
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features verified: 1) Slider without auto-scroll ✓ 2) Instagram 6 images ✓ 3) Pasticceria 3 photos ✓ 4) Sala lightbox ✓ 5) Ludoteca in services ✓. Brand logos in Chi Siamo are placeholders - may need actual logos.
